baseline_gdbco.name: Standard GdBCO (Melt-Texture)
baseline_gdbco.description: Historical baseline using top-seeded melt-texture growth.
baseline_gdbco.geometry_scaling_note: Catalog k_fp values assume bulk sample geometry (10mm x 10mm x 1mm). Simulation uses thin-film tape geometry (1μm x 12mm x 1m). Scale factor: k_fp_sim ≈ k_fp_catalog × (V_tape / V_bulk) = k_fp_catalog × (1e-6×0.012×1.0)/(0.01×0.01×0.001) = k_fp_catalog × 0.12. For accurate Bean-London stiffness, use Jc0-based calculation with actual tape dimensions.

apc_doped_bzo.name: GdBCO + 8% BZO Nanopillars
apc_doped_bzo.description: High-pinning efficiency using artificial pinning centers (BZO nanorods).
apc_doped_bzo.geometry_scaling_note: Catalog k_fp values assume bulk sample geometry (10mm x 10mm x 1mm). Simulation uses thin-film tape geometry (1μm x 12mm x 1m). Scale factor: k_fp_sim ≈ k_fp_catalog × (V_tape / V_bulk) = k_fp_catalog × (1e-6×0.012×1.0)/(0.01×0.01×0.001) = k_fp_catalog × 0.12. For accurate Bean-London stiffness, use Jc0-based calculation with actual tape dimensions.

nanostructured_y211.name: Nanostructured Y2BaCuO5 (Y211)
nanostructured_y211.description: Enhanced high-field stability via multi-scale defect distribution.
nanostructured_y211.geometry_scaling_note: Catalog k_fp values assume bulk sample geometry (10mm x 10mm x 1mm). Simulation uses thin-film tape geometry (1μm x 12mm x 1m). Scale factor: k_fp_sim ≈ k_fp_catalog × (V_tape / V_bulk) = k_fp_catalog × (1e-6×0.012×1.0)/(0.01×0.01×0.001) = k_fp_catalog × 0.12. For accurate Bean-London stiffness, use Jc0-based calculation with actual tape dimensions.

calibration_metadata.geometry_note: All k_fp_range values in this catalog are measured from bulk samples. To compute effective stiffness for thin-film tape geometry, either: (1) apply volume scaling k_fp_sim = k_fp_catalog × (thickness_sim/thickness_bulk) × (width_sim/width_bulk) × (length_sim/length_bulk), or (2) use Bean-London model with material-specific Jc0 values and actual tape cross-section.
